zacusca-recipe-vegetable-spread-comedera.name: Zacusca Recipe, Vegetable Spread.
zacusca-recipe-vegetable-spread-comedera.original_name: Receta de Zacusca, untable de vegetales.

ingredients.item: 2   cebollas grandes  (cortadas finamente (una roja y una blanca))

instructions: At a high heat grill frying pan his eggplants have been tipped up, till his skin gets shamed and soft.
Let them cool bad enough to get their skin out and let them run into a plastic bowl.
A pot adds 6 tablespoons of oil and splits the onion. Add the peppers and mix and then add the frosted carrot.
Add tomato, salt, sugar, pepper and vinegar.
Deja cocer a fuego medio durante 1 hora, con la tapa puesta. Hay que remover con frecuencia para que no se pegue al fondo.
After the hour of cooking, add an eggplant pulp and a bay. Let cook 30 more minutes scrubbing often.

zucchini-basti-lezzet.name: Zucchini Basti
instructions: 1. First, pumpkins are chopped in the form of cube.
2. Oil, onion and garlic are taken in a pot.
4. When the color of the onions begins to be pink, it is added to wavy.
5. Then chopped pumpkins are added and tasted with spices.
6. The latest fesle is added and it is left to pee with some water on it.
7. The pumpkin is pressed and served by spreading dereotu.

zucchini-bread-in-a-mug.name: Zucchini Bread In A Mug
instructions: Stir oil, flour, almond milk, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt together in an 8- to 12-ounce microwave-safe mug until well combined.
Pat zucchini dry with 2 paper towels. Add zucchini and walnuts to mug; stir until just combined.
Microwave, uncovered, on high power for 1½ to 2 minutes. Serve in the mug.
